records.ety: [LL. expatriatus, p. p. of expatriare; L. ex out + patria fatherland, native land, fr. pater father. See Patriot.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Expatriated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Expatriating (?).]

defs: To banish; to drive or force (a person) from his own country; to make an exile of.
quotes: The expatriated landed interest of France.

defs: Reflexively, as To expatriate one's self: To withdraw from one's native country; to renounce the rights and liabilities of citizenship where one is born, and become a citizen of another country.
